code:
%%{Education_GradeSync}}}%%
mindmap
  root(Education_LMS_Portal))
    src/
      Entry Points
        index.ts
          Main orchestrator
          Agent execution loop
          Interrupt handling
          Metrics collection
        launch_codex_orchestrator_session.ts
          CLI launcher
          Zellij layout builder
          Process spawner
        dynamic_timeline.ts
          Real-time status
          Log aggregation
      Configuration
        agents.ts
          Agent config types
          Config loader
          Log file helpers
        agentlark.ts
          Lark compiler bridge
          Output path resolver
        orchestrator_cli.ts
          CLI argument parser
          Option types
      AI Integration
        ai/
          index.ts - Backend factory
          openai/ - Codex SDK wrapper
          anthropic/ - MiniMax client
          tools/ - Tool definitions
          instructions/ - System prompts
      Zellij
        zellij/
          cli.ts - CLI wrapper
          sessions.ts - Session & KDL
          layouts.ts - Layout builders
          tabs.ts - Tab management
          types.ts - Type definitions
        zellij_client.ts
          High-level API
      Persistence
        memory_store.ts
          Artifact CRUD
          Memory queries
        progress_tracker.ts
          Agent progress
          Snapshot management
        agentfs/
          config.ts - Settings
          hooks.ts - Event hooks
          logger.ts - Action logging
      Utilities
        cli_styles.ts
          Chalk styling
        project_root.ts
          Path resolution
        squad_status.ts
          Completion tracking
        timeline_status.ts
          Status file I/O
    rust/
      agentlark/
        DSL compiler
        Lark to JSON
    configs/
      agents.lark
        Agent definitions
        Orchestration rules
    bin/
      Compiled binaries
        codex_orchestrator
        dynamic_timeline
        launch_codex_orchestrator_session
    logs/
      Runtime logs
        Per-agent log files
        orchestrator-internal.log
        interrupt.log
    memory/
      Artifacts
        Progress snapshots
        Handoff notes
        Interrupt summaries
    scripts/
      Build utilities
        patch_turso_native.ts
        package_dist.ts
        memory_inspector.ts
        condense_memory.ts
repo_description: a multi-agent orchestration framework that autonomously decomposes complex prompts into actionable tasks through a specialized hierarchy of user-definable agents, orchestrating them across Zellij term

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育LMS门户设计一个完整的GradeSync系统架构。核心是一个主入口index.ts，它要负责主协调器、Agent执行循环和中断处理。另外还需要一个独立的CLI启动器来处理Zellij布局。
明白了，index.ts作为Entry Points的核心。那dynamic_timeline.ts是做什么的？看名字像是实时状态相关的？
对，dynamic_timeline专门做实时状态展示和日志聚合。另外Configuration这块需要拆成三个文件：agents.ts管配置类型和加载，agentlark.ts对接Lark编译器，orchestrator_cli.ts处理命令行参数。
好的，Configuration分支已添加。AI Integration这块我打算用ai/目录，包含index.ts作为后端工厂，下面分openai/和anthropic/两个子目录，还有tools/和instructions/。这样结构清晰吗？

可以。Zellij这块需要更详细：zellij/子目录放底层实现，包括cli.ts、sessions.ts、layouts.ts、tabs.ts、types.ts，然后zellij_client.ts作为高层API封装。Persistence部分要有memory_store做Artifact的CRUD，progress_tracker管Agent进度和快照，agentfs/下面放配置、钩子和日志。
Zellij和Persistence都加上了。Utilities我放了cli_styles.ts、project_root.ts、squad_status.ts、timeline_status.ts，分别处理样式、路径、完成追踪和状态文件IO。
底层还有rust/agentlark/做DSL编译器，把Lark转成JSON。configs/放agents.lark定义Agent和编排规则。bin/输出编译好的二进制，包括codex_orchestrator、dynamic_timeline和launch_codex_orchestrator_session。
logs/、memory/、scripts/这三个目录需要展开吗？logs/下面有按Agent分的日志文件和内部日志；memory/存Artifact、进度快照、交接笔记；scripts/是构建工具。
没错，scripts/里面加上patch_turso_native.ts、package_dist.ts、memory_inspector.ts和condense_memory.ts这几个工具。整个结构应该完整了。
已确认。整个Education_LMS_Portal的mindmap结构已完成，从src/入口、配置、AI集成、Zellij、持久化、工具，到rust编译器、配置定义、二进制输出、日志、内存和脚本，全链路覆盖。
